name: runtime founder wedge route
command: Founder: I have a rough idea for a compliance copilot for small accounting firms. Help me choose a narrow beachhead, first customer segment, and riskiest assumption before we build.

name: runtime PMF route
command: Founder: is this product-market fit or just early sales pull? We have enthusiastic pilots, weak retention cohorts, and unclear repeat usage.

name: runtime AI builder route
command: AI builder: create an agent handoff for building a retrieval-based research assistant MVP. I need implementation plan, architecture risks, eval plan, verification, and coding-agent instructions.

name: runtime support tickets route
command: Product manager: we have 400 support tickets about reporting exports and dashboard filters. Turn them into product themes and prioritized improvements.

name: runtime roadmap debate route
command: CPO: sales wants SSO, customers want dashboards, and engineering wants reliability work. Turn this roadmap debate into a decision memo with options, tradeoffs, and recommendation.

name: runtime data validation route
command: Product ops: dashboard metrics disagree with warehouse data. Define a reliable metrics review and data validation plan.

name: runtime ab test route
command: PM: our checkout A/B test reached 22,000 users, conversion is up 3.1%, revenue guardrail is flat, and p-value is 0.03. Decide whether to ship, extend, or stop.

name: runtime plg playbook route
command: Growth lead: build a PLG growth playbook for our B2B self-serve product. Diagnose bottleneck, aha path, growth loops, PQLs, lifecycle triggers, pricing thresholds, and growth pod sprint.

name: runtime strategic decision route
command: Product leader: run a strategic decision making quality review for a pivot choice. Check bounded rationality, System 1 and System 2, anchoring, framing, confirmation bias, base rates, and sunk cost.

name: runtime group decision route
command: CPO: design a group decision process for a roadmap committee and prevent groupthink, group polarization, conformity bias, authority bias, common information effect, and weak dissent.

name: runtime valuation route
command: Founder: what is this SaaS company worth and what should we pay? I need DCF, public comps, enterprise value, equity value, price per share, and sensitivities.

name: runtime vc deal route
command: Founder: model this Series A term sheet with pre-money, post-money, cap table, dilution, option pool, convertible note, SAFE, and liquidation preference.

name: runtime cost of capital route
command: Finance lead: estimate WACC with CAPM, beta, risk-free rate, market risk premium, debt cost, tax rate, and market value weights.
